chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-2069 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. FRESH CASE 1.For orders on CMA 8157/25 2.For orders on CMA 8158/25 3.For orders on CMA 8159/25 4.For hearing of main case 10-12-2025 Mst. Reema Baladi (petitioner) present in person. **** 1. Urgency is granted. 2to4. Petitioner, who maintains this petition in person, does not press the instant petition and submits that after curing some defects, she will file petition afresh. Order accordingly. Instant petition stands disposed of as not pressed along with listed applications. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
